additionalRequirements: Consumers operating under this profile declare an aggregation-only access posture for any data product carrying capabilityFeatures including partitioned-by-day or pii-redacted.
Consumers must respect the pii-redacted feature flag on the focal product and not attempt re-identification by joining against external sources.
Consumers subscribe via signed access tokens issued by pinecrest:steward:catalog-governance; tokens are scoped to a specific resourceId and recommended versionId.
evidenceExpectations: Refresh-SLA freshness-policy attestation per spec/compliance/evidence-freshness-and-attestation.md:60-89, covering the most recent 30-day window.
Non-breaking-diff evidence on every schema-version transition the consumer relies upon.
Composition-pin freshness check confirming each upstream-product reference resolves to its declared @version.
forbiddenBehaviors: Row-level join against pinecrest/customer-master that bypasses aggregation thresholds.
Exporting raw data products outside the marketing-analytics trust boundary.
Caching consumer-side query results past the validUntil timestamp on the most recent refresh-SLA attestation.
